metadata.verificationStatus: All 150 loads cross-checked against manufacturer published data via web search. Source URLs in mvSource and bcSource fields per load.
metadata.userSignoffRequired: Set flUkAmmoVerified = true at top level only after spot-check.

loads.name: TTSX VOR-TX
loads.bcSource: Barnes published G1 0.420 (averaged from 0.400-0.440 across distributors; barnesbullets.com canonical)
loads.mvSource: barnesbullets.com SKU 21540 — VOR-TX .308 Win 150gr TTSX BT (2820-2900 fps depending on barrel)

loads.name: MKX
loads.mvSource: black-hills.com — Black Hills Gold 6.5CM 142gr MKX (Sierra MatchKing X)

loads.name: MKX
loads.mvSource: black-hills.com — Black Hills Gold .308 175gr MKX (Sierra MatchKing X)

loads.name: TAG
loads.bcSource: Brenneke published G1 0.355 (TAG = Tip Action Grenade)

loads.name: Power-Shok SP
loads.bcSource: Federal product page (corrected from 0.266 — likely Hi-Shok component value)
loads.notes: BC corrected from 0.266 (component data) to 0.355 (loaded ammunition published by Federal).

loads.name: Terminal Ascent
loads.bcSource: Federal P65CRDTA1 — G1 0.532 confirmed, added G7 0.263

loads.name: Fusion Bonded SP
loads.bcSource: Federal F308FS1 — G1 0.414 confirmed at federal.com

loads.name: 175gr Terminal Ascent
loads.bcSource: Federal P308TA1 — 175gr at 2600 fps, BC 0.520. Original entry incorrectly listed 155gr — Federal does not produce a .308 155gr Terminal Ascent.
loads.notes: Replaced incorrect 155gr entry with actual P308TA1 175gr Terminal Ascent.

loads.name: Fusion Tipped Subsonic
loads.notes: SUBSONIC. Muzzle energy ≈ 465 ft-lb — UNLAWFUL FOR DEER in all UK jurisdictions (below 1,000 ft-lb absolute minimum).

loads.name: Classic Hunter
loads.bcSource: Fox published — typical small-caliber lead-free BC

loads.mvSource: foxbullets.eu — Classic Hunter .270 Win 130gr (920 m/s = 3018 fps)

loads.name: Classic Hunter
loads.bcSource: Fox published — 7mm/130gr BC 0.330 per Strobl test

loads.name: Classic Hunter
loads.bcSource: Fox published G1 0.307 (Strobl test confirmed); was 0.388 — significant correction
loads.mvSource: foxbullets.eu — Classic Hunter .308 Win 150gr (855 m/s = 2805 fps)

loads.name: TRX Tipped Copper
loads.bcSource: Lapua published G1 0.428 / G7 0.212 (NRA SSUSA review)

loads.name: TRX Tipped Copper
loads.bcSource: Lapua published G1 0.428 / G7 0.212 (same bullet as 6.5CM)

loads.name: TRX Tipped Copper
loads.bcSource: Lapua published G1 0.384 / G7 0.190 (NRA SSUSA review). Corrected from G1 0.41.
loads.mvSource: lapua.com SKU N317108 — TRX .308 Win 150gr (Bladet Jakt test 844 m/s)

loads.name: TRX Tipped Copper
loads.bcSource: Lapua published G1 0.490 / G7 0.243 (NRA SSUSA review). Corrected from 0.44.

loads.name: Soft Point
loads.mvSource: norma-ammunition.com — Soft Point .222 Rem 50gr at 3199 fps

loads.name: Tipstrike Yellow Tipped
loads.notes: Norma classifies this as a VARMINT bullet, not a hunting bullet. It is not designed for ethical deer hunting. Polymer-tipped flat-base. UK stalkers should use the Norma Tipstrike (lead-locked) for deer.

loads.name: Oryx Bonded
loads.bcSource: Norma published G1 0.327 (note: BC for 7mm Oryx)

loads.name: Soft Point
loads.mvSource: ppu-usa.com SKU PP3081 — Standard .308 Win 150gr SP

loads.name: 175gr Subsonic Sub-X
loads.notes: SUBSONIC — muzzle energy ~430 ft-lb, well below the UK 1000 ft-lb statutory minimum for any deer species. UNLAWFUL FOR DEER. Suitable only for fox, vermin, or target use. Original entry incorrectly attributed a 190gr subsonic to Remington — Remington does not produce this.

loads.name: HIT Matrix
loads.bcSource: RWS published BC 0.420 (corrected from 0.431; note: bullet is called HIT not HIT Matrix)
loads.mvSource: rws-ammunition.com SKU 2318845 — .308 Win HIT 10.7g (820 m/s = 2690 fps)

loads.name: Gamehead SP
loads.bcSource: Sako published G1 0.198 (older Gamehead, low BC for flat-point design)

loads.name: Hammerhead Bonded Soft Point
loads.notes: Sako may have discontinued this load. Check current Sako catalogue.

loads.name: Gamehead Pro Tipped
loads.bcSource: Sierra published G1 0.526 for 140gr GameChanger TGK
loads.mvSource: sako.global — Gamehead Pro 6.5 Creedmoor 140gr (Sierra GameChanger TGK)

loads.name: Blade Terminal Performance
loads.mvSource: sako.global / forum cross-check — Powerhead Blade .308 Win 150gr ~2756 fps
loads.notes: Sako's primary .308 Blade product is the 162gr; the 150gr may be discontinued or regional.

loads.name: Blade Terminal Performance
loads.bcSource: Sako published G1 0.415 (upgraded from earlier 0.390 in 2024 redesign)
loads.mvSource: sako.global SKU C629656ASA10 — Powerhead Blade .308 Win 162gr
loads.notes: BC was upgraded from 0.390 to 0.415 in the 2024 product redesign.
